## Plugin Submission

### Summary

Describe what the plugin does.

### Plugin Folder

`plugins/community/launcher-...`, `plugins/community/action-...`, etc.

### Checklist

- [ ] The plugin has a `README.md`
- [ ] The plugin has a `plugin.json`
- [ ] Swift metadata comments match `plugin.json`
- [ ] Folder name uses the correct type prefix
- [ ] Screenshots are included for visible UI
- [ ] Privacy-sensitive behavior is documented
- [ ] The `.swift` file was tested in BetterTouchTool

### Safety Notes

List any file, network, shell, AppleScript, clipboard, accessibility, or data
collection behavior.
